class.name: DitherShader
class.brief_description: Post-process effect class that implements bayer dithering.
class.description: Post-process effect class that implements bayer dithering.
class.members: <member name="m_gamma_correction" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="2.2"> Controls the gamma correction to ensure visibility on the screen with the bayer dithering effect applied.
